title: Add CRI logs parsing to podman logs
body:
Podman logs was not parsing CRI logs well, especially
the F and P logs. Now using the same parsing code as
in kube here.
Created a new logs package `pkg/logs`.

Fixes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/601

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: Code LGTM but we cannot remove the copyright notice of the original file without violating the license.
@vrothberg Where did she remove the copyright?

@rhatdan `pkg/logs/logs.go` has been copied from K8s and adapted for libpod, but the original file has a copyright header (see https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/blob/master/pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/logs/logs.go).
Ok lets add that back in along with the comment about the modifications we have made.
Woops, didn't see the copyright license. Added it in with a comment stating parts of it have been used and modified to fit libpod.

:pushpin: Commit 318ced1 has been approved by `rhatdan`
